response.sustainable_habit: Water plants using leftover drinking water.

response.rewrite: I am as resilient as an ancient oak weathering the storm.
response.meaning: You possess the inner strength and courage to face challenges head-on.
response.eco_fact: Oak trees can live for over 1,000 years, surviving centuries of storms and climate shifts.
response.word_meaning: The ability of an ecosystem or organism to recover quickly from difficulties or disturbances.
response.eco_tip: Plant native trees to help your local soil and wildlife build natural resilience.
response.sustainable_habit: Choose to repair damaged belongings instead of throwing them away.
response.challenge: Be brave this week and talk to one friend about a simple eco-friendly change they can make!
